name: @normacore/station-app
description: Desktop Electron wrapper for NormaCore station-viewer
author: NormaCore <hello@normacore.dev>

scripts.start: npm run build:viewer && npm run build:station && npm run build && electron . --load-dist
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:release && npm run build:viewer && npm run build:station && npm run build && source .env.local 2>/dev/null && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run clean:release && npm run build:viewer && npm run build:station && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
